result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed. The R script loaded the specified survey datasets, merged them by the ID variable `NSID`, and derived the target variables `partnr19`, `partnr25`, `partnr32`, `partnradu25`, and `partnradu32` according to the provided harmonisation logic and missing-value codes. The resulting analysis-ready file has been saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
